'''鈭歵-g-s''' ('''tagasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pudder|pudder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pudder|pudder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-g-s
|-
! Lemma
| tagasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tagasithi|tagasithi]] || [[word:tagasiji|tagasiji]] || [[word:tagasishi|tagasishi]] || [[word:tagasi|tagasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tagasuthuth|tagasuthuth]] || [[word:tagasujuj|tagasujuj]] || [[word:tagasushush|tagasushush]] || [[word:tagas|tagas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tagasuthu|tagasuthu]] || [[word:tagasuju|tagasuju]] || [[word:tagasushu|tagasushu]] || [[word:tagasu|tagasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tagasufuth|tagasufuth]] || [[word:tagasufuj|tagasufuj]] || [[word:tagasufush|tagasufush]] || [[word:tagasuf|tagasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tagasethe|tagasethe]] || [[word:tagaseje|tagaseje]] || [[word:tagaseshe|tagaseshe]] || [[word:tagase|tagase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tagasothoth|tagasothoth]] || [[word:tagasojoj|tagasojoj]] || [[word:tagasoshosh|tagasoshosh]] || [[word:tagas|tagas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tagasotho|tagasotho]] || [[word:tagasojo|tagasojo]] || [[word:tagasosho|tagasosho]] || [[word:tagaso|tagaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tagasofoth|tagasofoth]] || [[word:tagasofoj|tagasofoj]] || [[word:tagasofosh|tagasofosh]] || [[word:tagasof|tagasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tagas忙th忙|tagas忙th忙]] || [[word:tagas忙j忙|tagas忙j忙]] || [[word:tagas忙sh忙|tagas忙sh忙]] || [[word:tagas忙|tagas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tagasathath|tagasathath]] || [[word:tagasajaj|tagasajaj]] || [[word:tagasashash|tagasashash]] || [[word:tagas|tagas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tagasatha|tagasatha]] || [[word:tagasaja|tagasaja]] || [[word:tagasasha|tagasasha]] || [[word:tagasa|tagasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tagasafath|tagasafath]] || [[word:tagasafaj|tagasafaj]] || [[word:tagasafash|tagasafash]] || [[word:tagasaf|tagasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:tagasasha|tagasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotagasasha|gotagasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitagasasha|gokitagasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:tagasn眉sha|tagasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotagasnkn眉sha|gotagasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitagasn眉sha|gokitagasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tagash毛sha|tagash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotagasnksh毛sha|gotagasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitagash毛sha|gokitagash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tagasrosha|tagasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotagasnkrosha|gotagasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitagasrosha|gokitagasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tagasmusha|tagasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotagasnkmusha|gotagasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitagasmusha|gokitagasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:tagasherasha|tagasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotagasnksherasha|gotagasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitagasherasha|gokitagasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:tagasngasha|tagasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotagasnkngasha|gotagasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitagasngasha|gokitagasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tagasyasha|tagasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotagasnkyasha|gotagasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitagasyasha|gokitagasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:tagasyamasha|tagasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotagasnkyamasha|gotagasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitagasyamasha|gokitagasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:tagasn眉sh毛sha|tagasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotagasnkn眉sh毛sha|gotagasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitagasn眉sh毛sha|gokitagasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tagasn眉rosha|tagasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotagasnkn眉rosha|gotagasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitagasn眉rosha|gokitagasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tagasn眉musha|tagasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotagasnkn眉musha|gotagasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitagasn眉musha|gokitagasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:tagash毛n眉sha|tagash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotagasnksh毛n眉sha|gotagasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitagash毛n眉sha|gokitagash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tagash毛rosha|tagash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotagasnksh毛rosha|gotagasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitagash毛rosha|gokitagash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tagash毛musha|tagash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotagasnksh毛musha|gotagasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitagash毛musha|gokitagash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:tagasron眉sha|tagasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotagasnkron眉sha|gotagasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitagasron眉sha|gokitagasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:tagasrosh毛sha|tagasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotagasnkrosh毛sha|gotagasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitagasrosh毛sha|gokitagasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tagasromusha|tagasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotagasnkromusha|gotagasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitagasromusha|gokitagasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:tagasmun眉sha|tagasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotagasnkmun眉sha|gotagasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitagasmun眉sha|gokitagasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:tagasmush毛sha|tagasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotagasnkmush毛sha|gotagasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitagasmush毛sha|gokitagasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tagasmurosha|tagasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotagasnkmurosha|gotagasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitagasmurosha|gokitagasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:tagas|tagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:t忙g忙s|t忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotagas|hotagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hot忙g忙s|hot忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotagas|hohotagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohot忙g忙s|hohot忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉tagas|n眉tagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉t忙g忙s|n眉t忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉tagas|n眉n眉tagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉t忙g忙s|n眉n眉t忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂tagas|n茂tagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂t忙g忙s|n茂t忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂tagas|n茂n茂tagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂t忙g忙s|n茂n茂t忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutagas|lutagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lut忙g忙s|lut忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutagas|lulutagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulut忙g忙s|lulut忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litagas|litagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lit忙g忙s|lit忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitagas|lilitagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilit忙g忙s|lilit忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotagas|kotagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kot忙g忙s|kot忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotagas|kokotagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokot忙g忙s|kokot忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketagas|ketagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ket忙g忙s|ket忙g忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketagas|keketagas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keket忙g忙s|keket忙g忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
